protocol: 反哺验证协议v1-协议2（思维种子）

key_points: Exploits market regimes with increased volatility clustering
Likely effective as a filter, enhancing other signals
Pairs well with trend-following strategies in high-volatility environments
Exploits volatility regime, captures interaction between short-term (20d) and long-term (60d) volume std
Suitable for high-volatility liquid assets like BTC or SPY

差异洞察: GLM视作filter/辅助信号，NL70B视作独立信号——角色定位分歧
GLM提及策略匹配（趋势跟踪），NL70B偏重资产匹配（高波动标的）
GLM关注宏观市场状态（regime switching），NL70B关注微观指标结构（长短周期std交互）
种子一句话: Volume volatility structure (20d×60d std product) is a standalone volatility regime detector - works as a gate for when to apply trend-following vs mean-reversion, not as a direct alpha signal.
